html.message: First snapshot — no previous snapshot to compare against. Full visual QA required.

output.reason: Figma MCP unavailable — performed cross-browser visual self-consistency audit and implementation review. Cannot compare against Figma design.

crossBrowserConsistency.summary: All three browsers (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit) render identically at all four breakpoints (375, 768, 1024, 1440). No cross-browser visual discrepancies observed.

visualSelfConsistencyAudit.summary: Without Figma comparison, performed a thorough visual consistency audit of the implementation across breakpoints and block variations.

observations: Dark charcoal background container with rounded-3xl corners renders correctly on all instances
Container padding visible and consistent across all 16 block instances
Heading area properly positioned at top of each section with white text on dark background
Pagination progress bar and navigation arrows properly aligned in a horizontal bar between heading and carousel slides
Cards display in a horizontal carousel layout with proper slide sizing
Cards appear approximately 3-4 visible per viewport width, consistent with typical carousel behavior
Dark background extends to proper width with rounded corners, inset from page edges by approximately 32px (md:before:-inset-x-8)
Navigation arrows are clearly visible in top-right area of carousel region
Pagination bar spans the space between autoplay toggle (if present) and navigation arrows
Heading text is white, large display font (appears to be Anton or similar display font), consistent across all sections
Cards contain images at top, text content below, maintaining equal height via CSS (height: 100% chain)
Layout properly adapts with approximately 3 cards visible
Dark background and rounded corners maintained
Navigation and pagination remain properly aligned
Cards maintain proper proportions
Approximately 2 cards visible per viewport
Container padding adjusts for narrower viewport
Heading stacks properly, no overflow
Navigation arrows and pagination bar remain functional and visible
Single card visible per slide, cards take full width
Heading text scales down appropriately without overflow
Dark background extends edge-to-edge with proper side gutter inset
Navigation elements remain accessible and properly positioned
Cards maintain readable text sizes and proper image aspect ratios
Long heading instance wraps gracefully across multiple lines

blockVariations.summary: 16 block instances cover diverse configurations: automatic/manual/related sources, multiple post types (blog, team, resources, policies), various carousel settings.

variations.note: Manual mode with 0 slides. The section header renders but carousel area is empty. This is expected behavior when selected posts are unavailable or not configured.
Shows 3 slides — hideIfEmpty only hides when there are truly 0 results. This instance has posts available.
Very long heading wraps gracefully without overflow on all breakpoints.
No navigation or pagination — clean minimal appearance.
Only instance with autoplay toggle button visible.

observations: Section headings use a large bold display font (appears to be Anton), white color on dark background — consistent across all 16 instances
Card titles are readable at all breakpoints
No visible text truncation or overflow issues
Dark charcoal background (#333 or similar) consistently applied
White text on dark background provides good contrast
Neon-green gradient visible on page hero and accent elements — CSS locks gradient to neon-green/blue per the stylesheet
Team member cards (Section 6) show neon-green/yellow card backgrounds — different card style for team_member post type
Navigation buttons appear as white/light circles on dark background
Consistent vertical padding (py-18 / md:py-23 = 72px / 92px) on all instances
Heading-to-carousel spacing (mb-8 / md:mb-16 = 32px / 64px) uniform across sections
Pagination-to-carousel gap (mb-6 = 24px) consistent
Card gaps appear consistent across all carousel instances
Dark background container uses rounded-3xl (24px) consistently
Card images have rounded corners consistent with theme card components

notes.observation: Section 9 'Featured Posts' renders the section wrapper and heading but shows 0 carousel slides. This appears to be a manual-mode carousel with no posts selected or all selected posts removed. The visual result is a dark section with just a heading — which may look intentionally empty or possibly like a broken state to end users.
notes.recommendation: Consider whether hideIfEmpty should be enabled by default for manual mode, or if this is acceptable test content behavior.

notes.observation: Section 10 is labeled 'TEST: Post Hero' in the page audit heading. This appears to show a post hero-style content within the carousel block context. The large heading text and image-heavy layout are visually distinct from other carousel instances but render without issues.
